short_summary: Iran deal signals, UK seizes shadow tanker
rationale: The potential US-Iran deal could ease energy prices relevant to Poland, while the UK seizure of a Russian shadow fleet tanker is a notable development near European waters; otherwise no qualitative change in Poland's threat environment.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly close to signing
top_events.summary: A US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could lower global oil and gas prices, indirectly easing Poland's energy costs. Conflicting signals mean uncertainty remains, but progress is a mild positive.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: A Russian shadow fleet tanker seized in the English Channel signals tightening enforcement of sanctions near European waters, relevant to Poland's interest in isolating Russia economically.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Switzerland's right-wing referendum to cap population at 10 million reflects broader European migration debate; indirect relevance to EU migration policy discussions Poland participates in.
